  have h1 : Injective (λ n : Int => 2 * n) :=
    λ _ _ h => Int.mul_left_cancel (by decide) h

    apply Set.ext; intro x; simp [even, eq_comm]
  rw [← h2]
  exact equinum_trans (equinum_symm (equinum_univ_range h1)) Int_denum

by
  apply equinum_trans (v := Int)
  · apply equinum_symm
    have h1 : injective (λ n : Int => 2 * n) := by
      intros n1 n2 h; simp at h; assumption
    have h2 := range_equinum (λ n : Int => 2 * n) h1
    have h3 : Ran (graph (λ n : Int => 2 * n)) = {n : Int | even n} := by
      apply Set.ext; intro x; simp [even, Ran, graph]
      exact Iff.intro (λ ⟨k, hk⟩ => ⟨k, hk.symm⟩) (λ ⟨k, hk⟩ => ⟨k, hk.symm⟩)
    rw [h3] at h2
    exact h2
  · exact denum_Int

by
  let f : Int → Int := λ n => 2 * n
  have hf : injective f := λ n1 n2 h => Int.mul_left_cancel h (by decide)
  have h1 : Univ Int ∼ range f := range_equinum f hf
  have h2 : range f = {n : Int | even n} := by
    ext n; apply Iff.intro
    · intro h; obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := h; rewrite [← hk]; exact ⟨k, rfl⟩
    · intro h; obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := h; exists k; exact hk.symm
  rewrite [h2] at h1
  exact equinum_trans (equinum_symm h1) denum_Int
